_comment: Seed registry for the Peregrine plugin marketplace. Copy this file to the root of the Knaox/peregrine-plugins GitHub repo (branch main) so that Peregrine panels fetching https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Knaox/peregrine-plugins/main/registry.json can discover available plugins.

plugins.name: Server Invitations
plugins.description: Invite users to your servers by email with granular Pelican permissions. Edit permissions of active subusers and pending invitations. Ships with Peregrine by default. Admin-aware — panel admins can manage invitations / subusers on any server.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team

plugins.name: Egg Config Editor
plugins.description: Auto-detects parameters in your server's game config files (server.properties, GameUserSettings.ini, PalWorldSettings.ini, …) and translates known keys via the plugin's own i18n dictionary. Admin only declares which file to expose for which egg; everything else is data-driven. Ships preinstalled with Peregrine. Bundles 145+ ARK / Minecraft / Palworld parameter labels in EN + FR; unknown keys are auto-humanised so the UI never shows raw camelCase.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team

plugins.name: ARK:SE Mods Installer
plugins.description: Browse, install and uninstall Steam Workshop mods for ARK: Survival Evolved (appid 346110) directly from the server panel. Two-tab UI (Marketplace + Installed) with search, tag chips, sort, optimistic install/uninstall, bulk actions and a 5-layer cache (Redis SWR + cron warm + HTTP + single-flight lock) so Steam is rarely hit. Adds and removes mod IDs in a configurable Pelican egg variable (default MOD_ID, format `id1, id2, id3`). Admin picks allowed eggs, target variable, page route, page label, mods/page (25 or 50), Steam Web API key. Variable must be flagged user_editable on the Pelican egg.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team

plugins.name: ARK:ASA Mods Installer
plugins.description: Browse, install and uninstall CurseForge mods for ARK: Survival Ascended (gameId 83374) directly from the server panel. Two-tab UI (Marketplace + Installed) with search, dynamic category chips (pulled from CurseForge), 5-axis sort (Popularity / Top downloads / Recently updated / Most recent / Featured), optimistic install/uninstall, bulk actions and a 5-layer cache (Redis SWR + cron warm + HTTP + single-flight lock) so CurseForge is rarely hit. Adds and removes mod IDs in a configurable Pelican egg variable (default MOD_IDS, comma without spaces — matches the official ARK:ASA Pelican egg). Admin picks allowed eggs, target variable, format (comma / comma-space), page route, page label, mods/page (25 or 50), CurseForge API key. Variable must be flagged user_editable on the Pelican egg. CurseForge API key is free at https://console.curseforge.com/ — approval typically takes 24-48 h.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team
